visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a smartphone screen displaying a detailed 3D golden dragon graphic wallpaper with Bitcoin elements. The time is 7:45 AM, and the battery is at 100%. A hand is visible holding the clear case of the phone. (2) A medium shot features a middle-aged man with glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a white t-shirt featuring a cartoon character. He stands in a brightly lit indoor corridor with white walls, looking into the camera with an animated expression. (3) The scene transitions to a medium shot of the same man in an office setting, gesturing with the smartphone in his hand while talking. He wears a yellow wristband, and the background shows typical office furniture and shelving. (4) A close-up shows the phone screen at 10:01 AM with 95% battery. The man's hand holds the phone against the blurred office background. (5) A different hand enters the frame and takes the phone, followed by a close-up of the screen showing various app icons on the home screen at 1:20 PM with 72% battery. (6) Another close-up at 5:13 PM shows the battery at 49%. (7) The man is seen at home in a medium shot, sitting on a light-colored sofa and wearing a green jacket. He shows the phone's control center, indicating 29% battery at 7:58 PM. (8) The final shot is a close-up of the phone screen at 10:53 PM with 15% battery before sleep.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c 有意思 tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Subtitle]: 嘿 早上7:45. (2) [Subtitle]: 這個電力 現在是100%. (3) [Subtitle]: 這就是我 現在用的 Air. (4) [Subtitle]: 剛進公司 就把我叫來. (5) [Subtitle]: iPhone Air. (6) [Subtitle]: 我自己現在的主力機. (7) [Subtitle]: 我從早上 7:45 起床開始. (8) [Subtitle]: 用到現在 10點. (9) [Subtitle]: 今天要記錄一整天 到底電力夠不夠用. (10) [Subtitle]: 現在呢 電力還有 95%. (11) [Variety]: 老闆交出手機 現在幾%了. [Subtitle]: 自己拿. (12) [Subtitle]: 現在下午 1:20 72%. (13) [Subtitle]: 拿到Tim哥的手機了. (14) [Subtitle]: 5:13 現在還有 49%. (15) [Subtitle]: 回到家了 7:58. (16) [Subtitle]: 我現在電力呢 還有 29%. (17) [Subtitle]: 我要睡覺了 剩 15%.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator shown throughout, 1 female staff member whose hand is visible when taking the phone.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a white t-shirt with a 'Mr. Peanut' graphic. He later puts on a green jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An office hallway with white walls and wooden doors; a workspace with red storage bins and office equipment; a home living room with a light fabric sofa.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins speaking in an energetic, high-arousal tone with clear enunciation. A bright, major-key acoustic guitar track with light percussion plays as BGM at roughly 115 BPM. (2) A digital 'pop' sound effect occurs as text overlays appear. The male voice continues with rapid speech and positive valence, describing the morning start. (3) A female voice enters with a moderate, friendly pitch, engaging in a brief conversation with the male. The background room tone is clean with minimal interference. (4) A synthetic 'whoosh' transition SFX signals a shift in time. The female voice narrates the battery updates with neutral pitch and moderate speed. (5) The male voice returns at home, his pitch slightly lower and delivery more relaxed, reflecting the end of the day. The BGM maintains its steady rhythm until a final soft digital click ends the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Wake up -> Morning work -> Afternoon check -> Evening home -> Bedtime conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To demonstrate the real-world battery performance of the 'iPhone Air' over a full day of typical usage, providing proof of its endurance through chronological updates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator explicitly identifies the device as his 'main machine' and documents its performance throughout the day in a promotional manner.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows a high-retention short-form format with rapid cuts and frequent time-stamped text overlays.
